description: A marine engineering team needs a digital twin of their DeepMapper UUV (Unmanned Underwater Vehicle) concept built in OpenVSP so they can size the internal battery based on available volume. Read the specification file at ~/Desktop/uuv_spec.txt. In OpenVSP, build a parametric UUV model with an axisymmetric Hull (length 3.50 m, max diameter 0.35 m), Cruciform Tail Fins (using a Wing component), and an Aft Propeller (3 blades, 0.25 m diameter, positioned near the aft end at X = 3.50 m). Once the model is built, run the CompGeom analysis tool (Analysis > CompGeom) to calculate the vehicle's geometric properties. Save the model to ~/Documents/OpenVSP/uuv_model.vsp3. Finally, write a text report to ~/Desktop/uuv_hydro_report.txt containing the exact Theoretical Volume and Wetted Area values obtained from the analysis.
